summary: Completed testing of Loading Port bug fix and Business Confirmation PDF country display. All 6 features verified working correctly. Backend tests: 7/7 passed. Frontend tests: All critical flows verified.
passed_tests: 1. Loading Port dropdown exists in New Trade form (data-testid='loading-port-select') showing only loading-type ports (11 ports)
2. Loading Port dropdown shows ports with country names (e.g., 'Chornomorsk, Ukraine', 'Odessa, Ukraine')
3. Creating new trade with Loading Port saves correct loadingPortId, loadingPortName, loadingPortCountry (verified with Odessa)
4. Editing trade MW2611 preserves loadingPortId - shows 'Chornomorsk, Ukraine' in dropdown
5. Trade Detail B/L tab shows correct 'Load Port: Chornomorsk'
6. B/L dialog shows correct 'Load Port: Chornomorsk, Ukraine' in dropdown
7. Business Confirmation PDF PRICE section includes country: 'USD 241.00/MT CIF Marmara Ports, Turkiye'
8. Backend API correctly stores loadingPortId separate from basePortId
9. Backend API correctly populates loadingPortName and loadingPortCountry from ports collection
critical_code_review_comments: NewTradePage.js line 107: loadingPortId correctly initialized as separate field in form state
NewTradePage.js line 219: loadPorts memo correctly filters ports by type='loading'
NewTradePage.js lines 505-509: Loading Port dropdown correctly uses loadPorts and has data-testid
TradeDetailPage.js lines 280-292: openBlDialog correctly initializes loadPortId from trade.loadingPortId
TradeDetailPage.js lines 309-329: saveBlDetails correctly saves loadingPortId
business_confirmation.py lines 160-183: PRICE section correctly appends country to base port and port variations
seed_data_creation: None - used existing trade MW2611 which has loadingPortId=Chornomorsk
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loading Port feature fully tested. Trade MW2611 (id: 69bedc4dc408d970c5f9435a) has loadingPortId set to Chornomorsk (69bec62da2d2c05899e50d4b). Loading ports in DB have type='loading'. Business Confirmation PDF correctly shows country names in PRICE section. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_loading_port.py
